name: Bacon, Cheese, and Tomato Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon on a microwave-safe dish. Cover loosely and microwave until crisp, 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 minutes.
2. Spread toast with mayo or salad dressing. Sprinkle with dill weed.
3. Place toast slices on serving plate. Top with tomato and cheese slices.
4. Crumble bacon and sprinkle over top.
5. Microwave uncovered on high until cheese begins to melt, 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
